name: Best Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
2. Cream together the butter and shortening until smooth.
3. Gradually add the sugars, beating well at medium speed of an electric mixer.
4. Add the eggs and vanilla extract, beating well.
5. Combine the flour, baking soda, and salt; gradually add to the creamed mixture, mixing well.
6. Stir in the chocolate morsels.
7. Drop dough by heaping teaspoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets.
8. Bake for 9 to 11 minutes, or until edges are lightly browned.
9. Cool slightly on the cookie sheets before transferring them to wire racks to cool completely.
Double Chip Cookies:
1. Follow the recipe above using peanut butter or butterscotch morsels and semisweet chocolate morsels instead of 12 oz semisweet chocolate morsels.
2. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 to 17 minutes, or until edges are lightly browned.
Jumbo Chocolate Chip Cookies:
1. Follow the recipe above, dropping each cookie into a 3-inch circle with fingertips onto ungreased cookie sheets.
2. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 to 17 minutes, or until edges are lightly browned.
